contradictions.claim_text: Educateme is already #1 in Sproochtest, so this is a pure upsell with no real competitor pressure.
contradictions.resolution: Contradicted. Official preparatory routes and multiple live private offers already exist, so empty-market or no-pressure language must be dropped.
contradictions.blocking_effect: Blocks any dashboard or narrative field that depends on uniqueness, monopoly, or pure-upsell framing.
contradictions.notes: This falsifies the broad market-gap claim rather than ranking provider quality.

open_issues.claim_text: The State can reimburse up to 750 euros for approved Luxembourgish language course fees, and the Sproochentest fee can also be reimbursed after success.
open_issues.resolution: Use the exact conditional wording from Guichet instead of a simplified cap-driven marketing line.
open_issues.notes: The route is real, but the reviewed record only cleanly supports the EUR 75 test fee plus post-application reimbursement conditions.

open_issues.claim_text: INLL is free but has waitlists.
open_issues.notes: Waitlist conditions were not established in the current source set.

open_issues.claim_text: Prolingua has a lower pass rate.
open_issues.notes: No independent pass-rate comparison was found.

open_issues.claim_text: Established brand and strong demand with waiting list.
open_issues.notes: No external evidence reviewed for demand, waitlist depth, or brand strength.
